{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":434880,"duration_api_ms":404017,"num_turns":66,"result":"Step 3 complete and committed (27077a1).

**Summary**
- `BaseLayout.astro` rewritten: sticky header (brand mark + desktop nav + theme toggle + JS-less `<details>` mobile menu), `<main id="main" class="site-main">`, footer row, `.skip-link` as `<body>`'s first child.
- `<head>` inlines `themeInitScript` for FOUC prevention; the only added inline script is the 14-line toggle handler (2-state light↔dark, falls back to `prefers-color-scheme` when storage is empty, no external deps).
- New `packages/theme-default/src/styles/layout.css` owns chrome styling using v0.2 tokens; `base.css` imports it.
- Canonical / og:* meta contract from step 8d is unchanged — all 4 SEO regression tests still pass.
- Blog pages (`index`, `[...slug]`, `graph`, `tags/index`, `tags/[tag]`) drop their `<Fragment slot="nav">` blocks now that the layout owns the nav.
- BaseLayout tests: kept tests 1–10 (test 5 + 6 updated for v0.2 markup), added tests 11–14 covering nav aria-label, inlined theme-init, no SSR `data-theme` attr, theme toggle button + `<details>` mobile menu.

**AC results**
- `pnpm -r typecheck` → 0 errors
- `pnpm lint` → clean
- `pnpm test` → 430 pass / 0 fail (BaseLayout 14 pass)
- `pnpm --filter blog build` → success
- standalone audit on `apps/blog/dist` → 0 violations
